name: TOP_ORIGIN_BY_FIRST_DISCLOSURE_2024
description: Top origin by first disclosure in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p0:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y0:Year)
WITH tp, min(y0.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)-[:ORIGIN_FROM]->(o:Origin {name: $origin})
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT tp) AS first_in_class_targetpair_count
ORDER BY first_in_class_targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In 2024, which organizations or individuals from China disclosed the largest number of first-in-class target-pair combinations?
In 2024, which organizations or individuals from US disclosed the largest number of first-in-class target-pair combinations?
In 2024, which organizations or individuals from Personal disclosed the largest number of first-in-class target-pair combinations?
